title: OperationsOS SolutionPack
description: A vertical-as-config descriptor. A SolutionPack declares the six config levers (roles, surfaces+allow-list, basemaps, vocabulary, brand tokens, seed scenes) that stand up one OperationsOS vertical with no code fork. RWR (water recon) is the reference pack; behaviour for RWR users is unchanged. See ADR-0023.

id.description: Stable machine id, lowercase slug. Selected by RWR_VERTICAL / OPERATIONSOS_VERTICAL.

displayName.description: Human-facing product name for this vertical.

version.description: Pack semver. Bumping is the contract-change signal.

extends.description: Optional id of a base pack this pack layers over (reserved for A2+; not consumed in A1).

roles.description: Vertical-specific roles layered OVER the platform-base roles. The merged set becomes KNOWN_ROLES. RWR lists its exact current role set so KNOWN_ROLES is unchanged in practice.

surfaces.description: The HTML entry surfaces this vertical exposes.

roleSurfaceAllowList.description: Role -> allowed HTML surfaces. Mirrors auth-store.ts allowedSurfacesForRoles. The special key '*admin' marks the super-user role that sees every surface; the special key 'vendor:*' matches any vendor:* role.

primarySurfaceByRole.description: Ordered (object insertion order) role -> primary landing surface. First matching role wins, matching the if-ladder in primarySurfaceForRoles. 'vendor:*' matches any vendor:* role.

basemaps.description: Branded analytic basemaps (subset of the S13 catalogue) this vertical surfaces.

defaultBasemap.description: id of the default basemap; MUST appear in basemaps[].

vocabulary.description: Entity nouns + KPI labels. Drives UI labels without code changes.

entities.description: Canonical entity-noun map (e.g. detection -> 'leak' for RWR, 'anomaly' for pipeline).

brandTokens.description: Design-kit token overrides per vertical (extends the S7A token system + brand.js). String values only; merged onto the platform defaults.

seedScenes.description: Default saved map scenes (crm.project_scene shape, S14A) seeded per vertical.

key.description: Role key as used by iam (e.g. 'sales:manage', 'ops.coordinator').
